provisions.detail: Non-exclusive license to operate one Wireless Zone store at specified location
7 years from effective date
One additional 7-year term. Must sign then-current agreement (may have materially different terms). Exercise Date: 3 months before expiration.
$500/month in advance, plus all other fees. Not a right to continue. Not credited against renewal fee.

Franchisor retains right to modify ALL aspects of System, Trademarks, standards, specifications, Operations Manual at any time. Franchisee must comply at sole expense. No limits on frequency or cost of changes.
Any modification accepted by 80% of WZ stores is binding on all franchisees.
$1,000-$25,000, non-refundable (except partial refund if site not found in 180 days)
9%-22% of Gross Profit on sliding scale. Deducted from Commissions before payout.
Required. Franchisor can auto-debit for all obligations.
Franchisor holds security interest in all franchisee assets.
Both franchisor AND Provider must approve location. 180-day deadline to find approved site or face termination.
Franchisee signs as tenant. Minimum 3-year initial term. Must deliver copy within 15 days of signing.
Requires prior written consent. Must demonstrate valid business justification, get Provider approval, sign general release.
80 hours virtual. Must complete within 120 days or face termination.
Must designate GM if no owner devoting 40 hrs/week. GM must complete training. New GMs must also complete training.
Must comply with all changes as posted. Franchisor's master copy controls disputes.
ALL customer information, sales data, and business records are franchisor's property. Franchisor may use for any purpose.
May not use trademarks, trade dress, or confidential information for AI/ML training or input into generative AI platforms.
Immediate termination if Provider withdraws sub-agent approval (termination without cause).

Bankruptcy, unapproved transfer, abandonment (5 days in 12 months or 3 consecutive), felony conviction, goodwill impairment, confidentiality breach, underreporting royalties, false books, lease loss, repeated defaults, fraud, anti-terrorism, cross-default, revoking EFT authorization.
30-day cure for: failure to pay, file reports, comply operationally, maintain minimum activations.
Failure to achieve $60,000 GP in any calendar year triggers franchisor buyout right (Section 13.04.B.8).
Failure to achieve minimum monthly activations (per Operations Manual) for 3 consecutive months triggers termination and/or buyout.
No transfer without franchisor consent.
30 days to match any bona fide third-party offer.
Pay all amounts; sign release; transferee qualified; sign new 7-year agreement; purchase initial inventory from franchisor; renovate store.
To single-purpose entity only. All owners must guarantee. Additional requirements per Section 12.03.
No ownership/involvement in competing wireless/wireline/entertainment/security business.
2 years, 10-mile radius from store or any existing WZ/affiliate store.
No discussions/negotiations with any Provider during term or for 1 year post-term.
$100,000 per violation plus attorneys' fees and costs.
Each Owner must sign personal guaranty covering payment under Franchise Agreement, any other franchise agreements, and performance of all obligations.
Unlimited personal guaranty covering all agreements with franchisor.
Not explicitly required but guaranty form is unlimited in scope.
Mandatory 4-hour minimum, neutral metro area ≥250K pop, not within 200 miles of either party. Mediator: 10+ years franchise experience. Costs shared.
Binding, within 15 miles of Indianapolis.
Indiana state or federal court (if permitted).
Indiana law.
Not required to mediate for: improper transfer, abandonment, trademark impairment, goodwill/fraud, confidentiality violations, non-compete violations.
Franchisee may not withhold amounts owed regardless of claims. Must pursue through separate action.
Waived under Security Agreement (Exhibit 3).
Franchisor may operate store if in jeopardy or franchisee in default. All costs borne by franchisee.
On any Triggering Event, franchisor may purchase assets at Purchase Price = 1x trailing 12-month GP + FMV of tangible assets.

Default not cured in 30 days; termination; expiration without renewal; abandonment (5 days in 12 months or 3 consecutive); payments 10+ days overdue; liens not removed in 30 days; 3 consecutive months below minimum activations; GP below $60,000 in any calendar year.
180-day purchase option at agreed or appraised value. Heirs must transfer within 12 months.
Must indemnify franchisor from all claims arising from store operation or breach of agreement. Includes officers, directors, principals, employees, representatives.
If franchisor prevails in any lawsuit (brought by either party), franchisee pays franchisor's attorneys' fees.
$60,000 GP per calendar year minimum — below this triggers franchisor buyout right. This is a distinctive clause found in the franchise agreement but NOT in the FDD Item 17 summary.
Franchisor's decisions may not be second-guessed by any court/trier of fact. Explicit language that franchisor judgment prevails even when alternatives are reasonable.
All innovations, improvements, advertising ideas created by franchisee become franchisor's property.
Revoking electronic funds transfer authorization is a non-curable default leading to immediate termination.
Sharing amounts paid to franchisee with another WZ franchisee or third party constitutes impairment of System goodwill — non-curable default.
